name: Diabetic Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the butter, eggs, sugar substitute, and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredient mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the grated apple and walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE
